dialog.stepLabel: Think quietly to yourself, and savor the aftertaste of the tales

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: A breeze passes by. You hear a sigh, soft and faint, carrying a warmth you haven't felt in a long time.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: No answer. Only the sound of the wind whistling.

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: In that moment, you suddenly understand—
This might be the final urban legend she left behind... one that can never be proven true or false.
